title: Ultimative FullBright
description: A clean, client-side, Embeddium-compatible FullBright mod.
body:
# 💡 FullBright
**A clean, lightweight, and completely client-side night vision utility for Minecraft Forge.**

Tired of rendering bugs with other FullBright mods when using Embeddium or Oculus? This mod provides a flawless, toggleable night vision effect without touching the game's core rendering engine, making it **100% compatible** with modern performance and shader mods.

### 🔗 Other Platforms
Prefer CurseForge? You can also download this mod over here: **[FullBright on CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ultimate-fullbright)**

---

### ✨ Features
* **Toggleable via Hotkey:** Press `O` (configurable in controls) to instantly toggle FullBright on or off.
* **Zero Clutter:** No annoying potion particles on your screen and no ugly potion icon in your top-right HUD.
* **Clean Inventory:** If FullBright is your only active effect, the intrusive potion effect box in your inventory is completely hidden.
* **Anti-Nether Fog:** Vanilla night vision makes the Nether an unplayable, blinding red mess. This mod automatically pushes the Nether fog far into the distance when active, giving you crystal clear vision.
* **Performance Friendly:** Carefully coded to prevent RAM leaks and TPS drops—perfect for high-end PCs pushing maximum frames.

### ⚙️ Compatibility & Installation
* **Client-Side Only:** You only need to install this on your client. It works perfectly on vanilla multiplayer servers, realms, and custom modpacks.
* **Modpack Ready:** Fully compatible with Embeddium, Rubidium, Oculus, and OptiFine.
